name: Consultation Scheduled — Confirmation SMS
trigger_description: When lead enters Consultation Scheduled stage

actions.message: Hey {{lead.name}}! 🎉 Great news — your consultation with {{lead.salesperson}} at Worthey Aquatics is confirmed. We'll be in touch with the exact date and time. Looking forward to meeting you and talking about your dream pool!

name: Consultation Scheduled — Confirmation Email
trigger_description: When lead enters Consultation Scheduled stage

actions.subject: Your Pool Consultation is Confirmed! 🏊
actions.message:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Exciting news — your pool consultation with {{lead.salesperson_fullName}} is confirmed!

Here's what to expect:

• We'll walk your yard together and discuss your vision
• You'll get expert advice on pool placement, design options, and features
• We'll talk through budget ranges so there are no surprises
• The whole visit takes about 45-60 minutes

A few things that help us give you the best experience:
✅ Think about what you want — lap pool, freeform, spa, tanning ledge?
✅ Know your approximate budget range
✅ Have any inspiration photos ready (Pinterest, magazines, etc.)
✅ Make sure we can access your full backyard

We've built hundreds of pools across South Central Texas and we're excited to help you create something amazing.

See you soon!

{{lead.salesperson_fullName}}
Pool Consultant
Worthey Aquatics
{{lead.salesperson_phone_display}}

Hi {{lead.name}}, just a friendly reminder — your pool consultation with {{lead.salesperson}} from Worthey Aquatics is tomorrow! Make sure your backyard is accessible and have any design ideas handy. See you then! 👋
Hey {{lead.name}}, {{lead.salesperson}} from Worthey Aquatics is heading your way! We'll be there in about an hour. If anything changed, just text or call us back at this number.

name: Consultation Completed — Thank You SMS
trigger_description: When lead moves from Consultation Scheduled to Proposal Sent (same day)

actions.message: {{lead.name}}, thanks for meeting with us today! It was great seeing your space and talking through ideas. {{lead.salesperson}} is putting together your custom proposal now — you'll have it soon. Excited about this project! 🏊

name: Consultation Completed — Recap Email
trigger_description: When lead moves from Consultation Scheduled (after visit completed)

actions.subject: Great Meeting You, {{lead.name}}! Here's What's Next
actions.message:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Thanks for taking the time to meet with us today! We really enjoyed seeing your backyard and talking through your pool vision.

Here's what happens next:

1️⃣ Your custom proposal — {{lead.salesperson_fullName}} is putting together a detailed design and quote tailored to your space and budget. Expect it within 3-5 business days.

2️⃣ Design review — Once you receive the proposal, we'll schedule a call or meeting to walk through every detail together.

3️⃣ Your decision — No pressure, no rush. We want you to feel 100% confident.

In the meantime, feel free to check out some of our recent builds at wortheyaquatics.com or reach out with any questions.

We're excited about what we discussed today!

Best,
{{lead.salesperson_fullName}}
Worthey Aquatics
{{lead.salesperson_phone_display}}

actions.subject: Pool Owner Pro Tips — Keep Your Pool Perfect 💧
actions.message:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Congrats on your first month as a pool owner! Here are some quick tips to keep everything running beautifully:

💧 Check chlorine and pH weekly (or let us do it!)
🍂 Skim and clean the filter basket regularly
🔧 Run your pump 8-12 hours daily in summer
🌡️ Watch for algae in the Texas heat — brush walls weekly
⚡ Schedule annual equipment checkups

Don't want to deal with any of that? Our weekly maintenance service starts at just $240/month. We handle chemicals, cleaning, equipment checks — everything.

👉 Want to add weekly service? Just reply to this email or call us.

Your pool is an investment — let's keep it looking amazing.

Worthey Aquatics
(210) 760-7236

actions.subject: How's the Pool Life Treating You, {{lead.name}}?
actions.message:
Hi {{lead.name}},

It's been about 3 months since we finished your pool — how's everything going?

This is a great time for a quick checkup:
✅ Equipment running smoothly?
✅ Water staying clear and balanced?
✅ Any concerns with the equipment or finish?

We offer a complimentary 90-day inspection for all our builds. If you'd like us to swing by and make sure everything is in top shape, just reply or call.

Also, with the season changing, now's a great time to think about:
• Weekly maintenance service
• Pool heater installation (extend your swim season!)
• LED lighting upgrades
• Automation systems

We're always here for our Worthey family.

Worthey Aquatics
(210) 760-7236

name: Existing Customer — Annual Pool Checkup Email

actions.subject: Time for Your Annual Pool Health Checkup! 🔧
actions.message:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Can you believe it's been almost a year? Time flies when you're enjoying your pool!

Just like your car needs regular service, your pool equipment benefits from an annual checkup. Our technicians will inspect:

🔧 Pump and motor performance
💧 Filter condition and pressure
⚡ Electrical connections and timers
🌡️ Heater efficiency (if applicable)
🏊 Surface and tile condition

An annual checkup catches small issues before they become expensive repairs. Most visits take about an hour.

📞 Schedule your checkup: (210) 760-7236
Or just reply to this email.

Thanks for being part of the Worthey family!

Worthey Aquatics

name: Existing Customer — Spring Opening Service Email

actions.subject: Spring Is Here — Let's Get Your Pool Summer-Ready! ☀️
actions.message:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Spring is here and pool season is right around the corner! Let's make sure your pool is ready to go.

Our Spring Opening Service includes:
✅ Full chemical balance and shock treatment
✅ Filter clean and equipment inspection
✅ Surface brushing and vacuum
✅ Check all returns, skimmers, and drains
✅ Automation system check (if applicable)

Don't wait until it's 100° and everyone's calling — book now and skip the rush.

📞 Call (210) 760-7236 or reply to schedule.

Let's make this your best pool season yet!

Worthey Aquatics

name: Existing Customer — Equipment Upgrade Reminder Email

actions.subject: Is Your Pool Equipment Due for an Upgrade?
actions.message:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Pool equipment typically lasts 7-10 years, and yours may be getting close. Aging equipment doesn't just risk breakdowns — it costs you more in energy every month.

Modern upgrades that pay for themselves:

⚡ Variable-speed pumps — save $50-100/month on electricity
🌡️ Heat pumps — 3x more efficient than gas heaters
💡 LED lighting — 80% less energy, lasts 10x longer
🤖 Smart automation — control everything from your phone

We offer free equipment assessments — we'll tell you honestly what needs replacing now vs. what can wait.

📞 Schedule your free assessment: (210) 760-7236

Don't wait for a breakdown in July!

Worthey Aquatics
